LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Common.descript: A Vault-Tec collectors trading card. This is just a common one, but maybe it'll be worth something to someone.
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Common.label: A common collectable trading card
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Legendary.descr: A Vault-Tec collectors trading card and this is a legendary one! This is a one of a kind piece, im sure its worth more than a few caps!
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Legendary.label: A legendary collectable trading card
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Rare.descriptio: A Vault-Tec collectors trading card, this is a Rare one. Not the most valuable, but still an amazing find!
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Card_Rare.label: A rare collectable trading card
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Edition_Lunchbox_Dir: A Vault-Tec collectors edition lunchbox. It's a little dirty, but still opens and may have something useful inside!
LanguageData.FCP_Item_Collectors_Edition_Lunchbox_Min: A Vault-Tec collectors edition lunchbox. It's in Mint Condition, there's probably something valuable inside!
Mint Condition Vault-Tec Collectors Edition Lunchbox
